technologies.implications: ML-powered next-best-action tools guide sales representatives on which accounts to visit, which SKUs to pitch, and at what price point – proven to increase revenue per call by 15–25% in FMCG contexts.
technologies.successfulCases:
Pernod Ricard has D-Star.

Other benchmarks:
Heineken's AIDDA ML platform helps sales reps plan routes and select customer touchpoints, cutting travel time by 30% and boosting volume by 3% in Mexico. [https://www.theheinekencompany.com/newsroom/brewing-with-ai/]
AB InBev uses ML to auto-generate 75% of customer orders and optimise supply order planning, reducing planning run times by 60%. [https://consumergoods.com/ab-inbev-helps-drive-marketing-optimization-ml-powered-bees]
Coca-Cola uses AI to analyse traffic patterns and delivery schedules for route optimisation, with trucks receiving mid-route adjustments based on real-time data. [https://www.cleverence.com/articles/business-blogs/how-pepsico-and-coca-cola-optimize-wholesale-distribution-with-ai-powered-logistics/]

technologies.name: Virtual reality
technologies.description: Virtual Reality (VR) immerses users in fully computer-generated, three-dimensional environments experienced through a headset. Beyond entertainment, VR is increasingly adopted for immersive workforce training, virtual brand experiences, and complex simulation scenarios that would be costly or risky to conduct in the real world.
technologies.implications: VR sales simulations allow reps to practise difficult customer negotiations, objection handling, and premium brand storytelling in a safe, repeatable environment before doing it live.
technologies.successfulCases:
1. L'Oreal launched VR Matrix Academy, training millions of hairstylists globally in new styling techniques via room-scale volumetric VR instead of costly in-person sessions. [https://www.fastcompany.com/3065245/loreal-is-using-virtual-reality-to-expand-the-matrix-ac]
2. Diageo Bar Academy partnered with Threedium to create a Virtual Bar experience for bar industry professionals, enabling immersive trade skills training via VR. [https://www.diageo.com/en/news-and-media/press-releases/2022/diageo-bar-academy-launches-unique-virtual-bar-experience-for-the-bar-industry-1]
3. Diageo's digital lab explores how VR and AI can shape social and sales experiences, with VR routinely used to research and train teams on in-store consumer experiences. [https://www.beveragedaily.com/Article/2023/10/10/From-AI-to-VR-Diageo-launches-lab-to-develop-digital-concepts/]
